---
title: "Evelyn March-Phillipps"
---

## Evelyn March-Phillipps

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1896-9)

### Biography

Probably Evelyn March-Phillipps  (d.1959) who married (1907), the 2nd  Lord Glenarthur (1883-1942) [PB, LG]

### Letters

- Letter from [1892]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
